derive the exact BT even up to seconds. Sages like Satyacharya
advice that Dasa can be calculated using Lagnasputa as well
and results could be derived. Even minor deviations in BT
could cause a difference of many minutes in lagna longitude,
and many months in dasa derivation. In this situation if there
did not exist a clear method for determination of Lagna
longitude, how can Satyacharya advice us to use Lagna
longitude for dasa calculation? He can't! This means that a
clear mathematical method for exact BT determination was
in use at that time! It must be a clean-cut mathematical method
which existed in that ancient past for sure.
Out of the many available methods Kunda multiplication
method is one such method.1t is from mathematical definition,
for the possibility of human birth in the pattern of destiny,
that Kunda multiplication method originated. As per ancient
